issue.message: Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices
Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices

StateFlow.value should not be called within composition
Unnecessary use of Modifier.composed
Unnecessary use of Modifier.composed

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.
Use `AppCompatResources.getDrawable()`
"os_shell_card_toast_run_completed" is not translated in "ja" (Japanese) or "en" (English)
"os_shell_toast_output_cleared" is not translated in "ja" (Japanese) or "en" (English)
"settings_reduce_toast_interruption_title" is not translated in "ja" (Japanese) or "en" (English)
"settings_reduce_toast_interruption_summary_enabled" is not translated in "ja" (Japanese) or "en" (English)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_reduce_toast_interruption_summary_enabled">隐藏运行完成、复制完成、清空完成等低优先级提示；错误和权限提示仍会显示。</string>

issue.message: "settings_reduce_toast_interruption_summary_disabled" is not translated in "ja" (Japanese) or "en" (English)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_reduce_toast_interruption_summary_disabled">允许低优先级提示通过液态玻璃 Toast 轻量显示。</string>

issue.message: Exported receiver does not require permission
Exported receiver does not require permission
Exported receiver does not require permission
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 35
issue.errorLine1: private fun isAppRuntimeShaderSupported(): Boolean = Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU

issue.message: This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 35. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 35. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Very long vector path (7082 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (16504 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Prefer `mutableDoubleStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableDoubleStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`

Calling this method indicates use of dynamic shortcuts, but there are no calls to methods that track shortcut usage, such as `pushDynamicShortcut` or `reportShortcutUsed`. Calling these methods is recommended, as they track shortcut usage and allow launchers to adjust which shortcuts appear based on activation history. Please see https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/launch/shortcuts/managing-shortcuts#track-usage
Use the KTX function `createBitmap` instead?
Use the KTX function `createBitmap` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
issue.errorLine1: val uri = runCatching { android.net.Uri.parse(this) }.getOrNull() ?: return null

issue.message: Use the KTX function `createBitmap` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Bitmap.scale` instead?
Use the KTX function `createBitmap` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Bitmap.scale` instead?

BgEffectElement does not override inspectableProperties(). The layout inspector will use the default implementation of this function, which will attempt to read BgEffectElement's properties reflectively. Override inspectableProperties() if you'd like to customize this modifier's presentation in the layout inspector.
